reasoning: The 2025/26 Premier League season is nearing its end in April 2026. A recent report from Yahoo Sports explicitly states that Wolves (a non-promoted team) and Burnley are almost certainly going down, and the race for the final (third) relegation spot is between several teams including West Ham and Leeds. Because Wolves is highly likely to take one of the three relegation spots, it mathematically precludes the possibility of all three promoted teams (Burnley, Leeds, Sunderland) being relegated. Furthermore, Sunderland appears to be safe and not involved in the relegation battle. The market probabilty before was 0.01. I assign the minimum possible probability of 0.02.
